name: Team O'Halleran
subject: one question
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
Yesterday marked the start of the 116th Congress, and the first time that Tom will be a part of a majority. And that means he'll have the opportunity bring our district's interests to the front and ce
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633cb4/1a8421e1/19be64729/405dedd2/819753171/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Thursday marked the start of the 116th Congress, and the first time that Tom will be a part of a majority. And that means he'll have the opportunity bring our district's interests to the front and center. Tom's first priority in the new Congress is end this shutdown so our economy or national security don't suffer. **That 's why he voted for bill Thursday to reopen the federal government and ensure our country's stability going forward.** But there's so much more Tom wants to accomplish -- from protecting our environment, to ensuring everyone in our community has access to low-cost, high-quality healthcare. **His most important accomplishment, however, will be fighting for issues that concern his constituents.[That's why Tom asked us to reach out and ask if you could complete a one question survey on some of the issues you'd like him to tackle in this next Congress.](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633cb4/1a8421e1/19be64729/405dedd3/819753171/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1MzA3In0=/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/one-question?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=85307")** | ****[TAKE THE SURVEY](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633cb4/1a8421e1/19be64729/405dedd3/819753171/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1MzA3In0=/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/one-question?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=85307")****
---
Thank you,

Team O'Halleran

****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq12019?refcode=em_pet_2019.01.06_b1_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq12019?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **
** **
** **
** **

Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [_clicking here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633cb4/1a8421e1/19be64729/405dedd6/819753171/VEsA/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/update-your-information").

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633cb4/1a8421e1/19be64729/405dedd7/819753171/VEsB/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/less-emails").

Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonans. If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633cb4/1a8421e1/19be64729/405dedd8/819753171/VEsO/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe").

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Petition: Government shutdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello there,
Last week, the 116th Congress was sworn in. Seeing pictures of all the new members taking their oaths filled me with hope and inspiration.
One of the new House's first orders of business was to vote on measures, which nearly all Senate Republicans have already supported, that would reopen our government after over two weeks of a partial shutdown.
This has dragged on long enough. The Senate should vote to reopen the government immediately. [**Will you please add your name to join me in calling on Republican leadership to end the shutdown and get furloughed Americans back to work?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc165/2a380d31/35abe652/f17093/2898717629/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/2019_JanuaryShutdown?source=e20190106_Shutdown1_na&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
The idea that many federal employees and contractors who are going without pay now have to choose between paying their bills and putting food on the table is sickening. And that President Trump is using them as a bargaining chip, saying that the shutdown could last for "months or even years" is downright cruel.
I stand ready to work with my colleagues on both sides of the aisle to get our government up and running again, but I need to know that you're with me. [**Will you please add your name if you 're ready to reopen the government?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc165/2a380d31/35abe652/f17093/2898717629/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/2019_JanuaryShutdown?source=e20190106_Shutdown1_na&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thank you for taking action.
With every good wish,
Senator Maggie Hassan

> [Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc165/2a380d31/35abe652/f1709c/2898717629/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MDEwNl9TaHV0ZG93blBldGl0aW9uX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20190106_ShutdownPetition_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

_ _
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc165/2a380d31/35abe652/f1709d/2898717629/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH
Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.
Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States
